items.title: Morgan Stanley Sees Fed Discounting War in Considering Any Hike

items.title: Trump Unveils New Tariff Plan for Trade Partners
items.summary:
The US is proposing new tariffs of at least 10% on imports from most major trading partners, citing forced-labor practices. 
The 10% rate would apply to partners who prohibit forced labor imports, such as Canada, Mexico, the EU, Taiwan, and the UK.
Ryan Majerus, Partner: International Trade Team at King & Spalding, discusses the path ahead for tariffs, Section 301 investigations, and where refunds

Part boat, part plane, part sci-fi: China debuts flying watercraft
items.summary:
The Soviet “sea monster” is back – and this time it’s for sale.
A Chinese company has completed the maiden flight of a passenger craft that skims just above the water’s surface using ground-effect technology, reviving a concept once associated with the Soviet Union’s giant Cold War-era experimental vehicles.
Chinese mobility company Navee on Thursday showcased its WaveFly 5X on Lake Taihu in Suzho
